025 = Payment denied. Your stop loss deductible has not been met 

026 = Expenses incurred prior to coverage 

027 = Expenses incurred after coverage terminated 

028 = Coverage not in effect at the time the service was provided. Redundant to codes 026 and 027 

029 = The time limit for filing has expired 

030 = Payment adjusted because the patient has not met the required eligibility, spend down, waiting, 
or residency requirements
